ksa_text: Knowledge of change management frameworks (Prosci ADKAR, Kotter) and how to adapt them for data and AI capability deployments with heterogeneous user populations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of resource management principles and techniques.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-K-003 (OP, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4144 is insufficient to establish relevance to survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.414, nist_ai_rmf=0.406, nice=0.402) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4144 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does OP-domain KSA OP-K-003 (composite 0.4144) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4144 for OP domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Survey Researcher at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms OP domain KSA at composite 0.4144 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4144, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
